importantFiles.purpose: Data dictionary defining the hierarchy and links of the main website navigation menu.
The UI rendering file for the top navigation menu.
Specific overrides for the complex dropdown menus.
Unified container page for the About Ministry section. Loads different tabs dynamically.
Source DB schema and data dump.

conventions.routing: File-path based routing, frequently leveraging query parameters (e.g., ?tab=xyz) for component switching.
conventions.assets: Use BASE_URL constant for all absolute linking of CSS/JS/Images to prevent pathing issues.
conventions.language: Arabic (RTL) is the default and primary directionality.
